page_types.label: Landing page
page_types.description: Marketing entry page with hero, proof, feature blocks, and conversion CTA.

page_types.label: Dashboard
page_types.description: Overview page with metrics, charts, lists, alerts, and drill-down entry points.

page_types.label: Data table
page_types.description: Dense data management surface with filters, sorting, row actions, selection, and pagination.

page_types.label: Form
page_types.description: Data entry flow with validation, required states, help text, and submit/cancel actions.

page_types.label: Settings page
page_types.description: Configuration page for account, workspace, billing, permissions, integrations, or preferences.

page_types.label: Pricing page
page_types.description: Plan comparison and purchase-intent page with tiers, feature matrix, FAQ, and CTA.

page_types.label: Onboarding
page_types.description: First-run or setup flow that guides users through activation.

page_types.label: Checkout
page_types.description: Purchase flow with cart, payment, address, review, confirmation, and trust cues.

page_types.label: AI chat interface
page_types.description: Assistant or agent surface with prompt input, conversation history, tool output, and citations.

page_types.label: Developer tool
page_types.description: Docs, API dashboard, code editor, CLI helper, logs, traces, or workflow automation interface.

page_types.label: Empty state
page_types.description: No-data state that explains value, cause, and next action.

page_types.label: Error state
page_types.description: Recoverable or blocking failure state with clear explanation and next action.

page_types.label: Mobile app screen
page_types.description: Mobile-first screen pattern with platform conventions, gestures, and compact hierarchy.

page_types.label: Component pattern
page_types.description: Reusable UI component guidance such as button, dialog, menu, navigation, tabs, toast, or card.
